name: aisuite4cn
documentation:
# aisuite4cn

简单、统一的接口，可连接多个生成式人工智能提供商。

`aisuite4cn` 针对于中国的各类大模型厂商提供通用的支持。学习了`aisuite`方案，并开发了该库。

`aisuite4cn` 使得开发者能够通过标准化的接口轻松使用多个大型语言模型（LLM）。使用类似于OpenAI的接口，`aisuite4cn` 使得与最受欢迎的LLM互动并比较结果变得简单。它是Python客户端库的轻量级包装器，允许创造者在不改变代码的情况下无缝切换并测试来自不同LLM提供商的响应。我们将在不久的将来扩展它以覆盖更多的用例。

当前支持的提供商包括：
moonshot（月之暗面）、Doubao（火山引擎）、Qwen（阿里云千问大模型）。


## Integrated Open source project
Special thanks to all contributors

### aisuite
https://github.com/andrewyng/aisuite

### openai-python
https://github.com/openai/openai-python

modules.name: aisuite4cn.framework.provider_interface
documentation: The shared interface for model providers.

classes.name: aisuite4cn.framework.provider_interface.ProviderInterface

methods.name: aisuite4cn.framework.provider_interface.ProviderInterface.chat_completion_create
documentation:
Create a chat completion using the specified messages, model, and temperature.

This method must be implemented by subclasses to perform completions.

Args:
----
    messages (list): The chat history.
    model (str): The identifier of the model to be used in the completion.
    temperature (float): The temperature to use in the completion.

Raises:
------
    NotImplementedError: If this method has not been implemented by a subclass.
Defines the expected behavior for provider-specific interfaces.

modules.name: aisuite4cn.framework.message
documentation: Interface to hold contents of api responses when they do not confirm to the OpenAI style response

classes.name: aisuite4cn.framework.chat_completion_response.ChatCompletionResponse
documentation: Used to conform to the response model of OpenAI

classes.name: aisuite4cn.provider.LLMError
documentation: Custom exception for LLM errors.

methods.name: aisuite4cn.provider.Provider.chat_completions_create
documentation: Abstract method for chat completion calls, to be implemented by each provider.

classes.name: aisuite4cn.provider.ProviderFactory

methods.name: aisuite4cn.provider.ProviderFactory.create_provider
documentation: Dynamically load and create an instance of a provider based on the naming convention.

methods.name: aisuite4cn.provider.ProviderFactory.get_supported_providers
documentation: List all supported provider names based on files present in the providers directory.
Factory to dynamically load provider instances based on naming conventions.

methods.name: aisuite4cn.client.Client.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the client with provider configurations.
Use the ProviderFactory to create provider instances.

Args:
    provider_configs (dict): A dictionary containing provider configurations.
        Each key should be a provider string (e.g., "google" or "aws-bedrock"),
        and the value should be a dictionary of configuration options for that provider.
        For example:
        {
            "openai": {"api_key": "your_openai_api_key"},
            "aws-bedrock": {
                "aws_access_key": "your_aws_access_key",
                "aws_secret_key": "your_aws_secret_key",
                "aws_region": "us-west-2"
            }
        }

methods.name: aisuite4cn.client.Client._initialize_providers
documentation: Helper method to initialize or update providers.

methods.name: aisuite4cn.client.Client._validate_provider_key
documentation: Validate if the provider key corresponds to a supported provider.

methods.name: aisuite4cn.client.Client.configure
documentation: Configure the client with provider configurations.

methods.name: aisuite4cn.client.Client.chat
documentation: Return the chat API interface.

methods.name: aisuite4cn.client.Chat.completions
documentation: Return the completions interface.

methods.name: aisuite4cn.client.Completions.create
documentation: Create chat completion based on the model, messages, and any extra arguments.
